data.content: Implementation review approved. Verified: all OpenRouter imports, functions (resolveSelectedOpenRouterAgentConfig, toOpenRouterTarget, resolveOpenRouterAgents, resolveOpenRouterAgentById, resolveKeychainSecrets, OPENROUTER_AGENT_COMMAND), and integration points removed from settings.ts and 38 other files (4084 lines deleted). OpenCode CLI integration added: opencode in SCANNABLE_AGENTS, readOpenCodeModels() helper, opencode case in inspectInstalledAgentMetadata(), dynamic model discovery in scanForAgents(). Commit 9c664af3 on main, pushed. Quality gates confirmed passing.
